metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.2-beta.3
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Adds logical libraries that aggregate multiple physical source folders. - Migrates legacy one-root libraries without rebuilding waveform caches. - Adds Explorer/Finder folder drops on libraries, All libraries, and results. - Blocks duplicate and overlapping roots and confirms ownership moves. - Keeps playlists/project bins separate as virtual collections.
